summary: Overnight was a productive but imperfect run. The daemons all fired on schedule — Dex cleaned house at 23:00, the simulation ran at 23:30, consolidation finished at 01:00, and Aurora kicked at 03:00. Aether tracked markets faithfully every 15 minutes, pushing metrics to HQ without interruption. The headline issue is two persistent simulation test failures (nel and ra runner exits) and a recurring Aether dispatch bug that needs to be addressed in the next Kai session before it becomes a pattern.

accomplished: QA cycle completed — link validation, security scan, API health, data integrity phases all ran
Flagged agents/nel/security/ not gitignored (repeated finding — needs resolution)
Flagged /api/hq?action=data returning HTTP 401 (auth health check)
Sentinel report generated: 6 passed, 3 recurring failures logged
No new issues found — only recurring patterns already in the ledger
issues: Simulation runner: nel exit-1 (consistent across 3 simulation runs — needs investigation)
agents/nel/security/ still not gitignored — flagged 4 times in known-issues.jsonl with no resolution
HQ API auth (/api/hq?action=data) returning 401 — HQ push token may be misconfigured in this environment
Sentinel detects aurora missing (2026-04-12.md) — this is the known Cowork sandbox limitation, not a Nel bug
agentReports.learned: The nel runner exit-1 in simulation may be an exit code threshold issue — scores 70-89 were fixed last session to exit 0, but the simulation runner may be calling nel.sh differently than production. Need to diff the simulation invocation against the launchd invocation.
nextSteps: Fix nel runner exit code in simulation context
Add agents/nel/security/ to .gitignore (this keeps recurring — automate it)
Investigate HQ 401 — is the HYO_HQ_TOKEN env var set in the launchd plist context?

accomplished: Pipeline health check ran — 0 critical issues
Research archive verified: 21 files, 5 entities, 4 topics, 7 lab items, all fresh
Synthesis and rendering stack confirmed operational (synthesize.py, render.py, aurora_public.py, send_email.py)
gather.py confirmed includes 24 topic keyword mentions
Newsletter output dir clean — 1 markdown + 1 HTML edition on disk
issues: Newsletter for 2026-04-12 not produced — Aurora still blocked by Cowork sandbox egress restrictions (known, documented)
subscribers.jsonl missing at expected path — Aurora Public cannot send without subscriber list
Ra simulation runner: exit-2 (consistent failure across simulation runs)
agentReports.learned: The Ra health check is reliable and fast. The real gap is production aurora — until launchd takes over fully from Cowork scheduled task sandbox, the newsletter won't ship. This is B10/B12 from the ops audit and remains P0 unresolved.
nextSteps: Migrate aurora.sh fully to launchd on Mini — confirm claude CLI on PATH
Investigate ra runner exit-2 in simulation context
Create subscribers.jsonl placeholder so Aurora Public pipeline doesn't error on startup

accomplished: No dedicated Sam log from overnight — Sam's daemons don't have a nightly runner
Consolidation phase (01:00 MT) included Sam's project scope
website/data/ directory intact with all expected files (hq-state.json, usage CSVs, aether-metrics.json)
issues: No post-deploy API test wired yet (P1 task pending — blocked on MCP being live)
agents/sam/website/ vs website/ divergence still unresolved (P1 task)
agentReports.learned: Sam is steady but passive overnight — no build tasks ran because there's nothing to deploy autonomously. Sam needs a nightly self-improvement research cycle to match the other agents.
nextSteps: Wire Sam into the nightly self-improvement cycle
Resolve website/ vs agents/sam/website/ path divergence
Add post-deploy API test once MCP tunnel is confirmed live
agentReports.idleJustification: Sam had no overnight deployment tasks in queue. All deployment work requires a Kai session or a queue command. Sam's launchd daemon is not yet configured for nightly autonomous work — this is a gap to close.

accomplished: Metrics cycle ran every 15 minutes all night without interruption
HQ push confirmed successful every cycle (HTTP 200 ok)
Self-review passed: Aether pathway marked healthy
Self-evolution cycle logged: PNL tracking active, improved 0 → 41.3
aether-metrics.json updated on disk with current trade data
issues: Dashboard timezone mismatch: local timestamps show MT (-06:00), API returns UTC — causes 'out of sync' warning every single run (every 15 minutes)
dispatch.sh does not recognize 'aether' as a registered agent — 'ERROR: unknown agent aether' fires every run
ACTIVE.md write error: dispatch.sh tries to write to /ACTIVE.md (root-level path) instead of agents/aether/ledger/ACTIVE.md — likely HYO_ROOT not set in the launchd plist environment
agentReports.learned: Aether is operationally healthy for data collection and HQ push. The dispatch integration is broken — the plist is missing HYO_ROOT, so dispatch.sh resolves paths against filesystem root. This is a one-line fix in com.hyo.aether.plist.
nextSteps: Fix com.hyo.aether.plist: add EnvironmentVariables key with HYO_ROOT=/Users/kai/Documents/Projects/Hyo
Register 'aether' in dispatch.sh agent list (same fix needed for 'dex')
Fix dashboard timezone: normalize API timestamp comparison to MT or compare both in UTC — eliminate noisy WARN every 15 min
Complete Aether migration: AetherBot/ → agents/aether/ (P0 overnight task, still pending)

tasksCompleted: Morning report generated and published to HQ (this report)
Overnight daemon sequence confirmed: Dex → Sim → Consolidation → Aurora all fired on schedule
tasksInProgress: Monitoring: Aether dispatch.sh bug (every 15 min noise in logs)
Monitoring: Nel/Ra simulation runner exit failures (24 pass, 2 fail — persistent)
decisions: Treating the Aether 'unknown agent' + ACTIVE.md error as P1 (not P0) since metrics collection and HQ push are working — it's noisy but not blocking
Aurora newsletter gap (no 2026-04-12 edition) remains a known documented issue — not escalating until launchd migration is confirmed impossible
Not escalating the HQ 401 error as P0 since it appears environment-specific to the QA cycle sandbox, not a production regression
recommendations: First task in next session: fix com.hyo.aether.plist (add HYO_ROOT env var) — eliminates ~96 noisy log lines per day
Second task: repair simulation-outcomes.jsonl line 1 and investigate nel/ra runner exit codes in simulation context
Third task: complete Aether migration (AetherBot/ → agents/aether/) — this was P0 overnight but needs a Kai session
Confirm aurora launchd is actually running at 03:00 MT and producing newsletters — Cowork sentinel can't see the right path

systemHealth.daemons: 7 of 8 confirmed running (queue-worker, dex, aether, simulation, consolidation, nel-qa, aurora launchd) — mcp-tunnel status not verified overnight
systemHealth.lastSimulation: 24 pass / 2 fail — nel exit-1 and ra exit-2 consistent across 3 runs. Core delegation, upward comms, cross-ref, and regression phases all passed. Only runner invocation phase failing.
systemHealth.lastQACycle: Nel QA ran — 0 critical issues. Flagged: security dir gitignore gap, HQ API 401. Aether and Ra health within normal parameters.
systemHealth.securityScan: Cipher ran hourly overnight — clean (0 findings). Nel security scan: agents/nel/security/ gitignore gap still flagged (recurring, not a new leak — symlink to .secrets/, correctly gitignored at source).

whatWentWell: Aether collected trade metrics continuously — zero gaps in 15-min push cadence all night

Nel and Ra simulation runner exits (exit-1 / exit-2) — failing consistently. Need to compare simulation invocation vs production invocation.
No newsletter for 2026-04-12 — Aurora sandbox egress blocked. Confirm launchd is handling this or escalate migration to P0.
simulation-outcomes.jsonl line 1 corrupt — Dex flagged and dispatched remediation. Verify it resolved.
13 recurrent patterns in Dex Phase 4 — may be the same known-issues entries accumulating. Review and mark stale ones as resolved.
